releaseNotes:
v1.3.0 — Jamrah جَــمْــرَه

## ✨ New
- First-run welcome popup with app story, support links & contributor info
- Tabbed settings modal (General / Pomodoro / Storage)
- "Search for Updates" button in Settings for manual update checks
- Update file size shown in update modal

## 🌐 Language
- Settings modal translated to English

## 🎨 Design
- Minimal pomodoro theme (removed progress ring)
- Settings sidebar tabs now visible
- White theme with clean borders
